title: Content Repurposing System — Notion Dashboard + 60 AI Prompts
subtitle: Turn 1 piece of content into 20+ assets across every platform.
description:
You don't need more content. You need more mileage from what you already have.

Notion dashboard + 60 AI prompts that transform one blog post, video, or podcast into 20+ pieces of content.

Notion Dashboard includes:
• Content Input Tracker
• Repurposing Pipeline (Kanban)
• Platform Matrix
• 30-Day Content Calendar
• Analytics Tracker

60 AI Prompts cover:
• Blog → Social Media (12 prompts)
• Blog → Video/Audio (10 prompts)
• Blog → Email (8 prompts)
• Blog → Other Formats (10 prompts)
• Video/Podcast → Written (10 prompts)
• Reformatting & Updating (10 prompts)

Format: Notion template + PDF prompt guide
Updates: Free lifetime updates
